assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets ServerSideSessions.FuzzExpiredSessionRemovalStart = true (explicitly or by relying on the default)
assertions.rationale: An LLM might infer a fuzzy start concept for multi-instance deployments but the exact property name is Duende-specific. However, the assertion allows relying on the default, so if an LLM doesn't mention it, that still fails. Changing to fail.
